references.hebrew: לָכֵ֛ן עַתָּ֥ה יִגְל֖וּ בְּרֹ֣אשׁ גֹּלִ֑ים וְסָ֖ר מִרְזַ֥ח סְרוּחִֽים׃
references.english:
Assuredly, right soon
They shall head the column of exiles;
They shall loll no more at festive meals.

commentary_links.hebrew: כִּי־כֹ֣ה ׀ אָמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֗ה אַל־תָּבוֹא֙ בֵּ֣ית מַרְזֵ֔חַ וְאַל־תֵּלֵ֣ךְ לִסְפּ֔וֹד וְאַל־תָּנֹ֖ד לָהֶ֑ם כִּֽי־אָסַ֨פְתִּי אֶת־שְׁלוֹמִ֜י מֵאֵ֨ת הָעָ֤ם הַזֶּה֙ נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֔ה אֶת־הַחֶ֖סֶד וְאֶת־הָרַחֲמִֽים׃
commentary_links.english:
For thus said GOD:
Do not enter a house of mourning,amourning Lit. “religious gathering.”
Do not go to lament and to condole with them;
For I have withdrawn My favor from that people
—declares GOD—
My kindness and compassion.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: תבא בית מרזח וגו &star אמר רבי אבהו מנין

commentary_links.hebrew: אֶ֥בְחַ֣ר דַּרְכָּם֮ וְאֵשֵׁ֢ב רֹ֥֫אשׁ וְ֭אֶשְׁכּוֹן כְּמֶ֣לֶךְ בַּגְּד֑וּד כַּאֲשֶׁ֖ר אֲבֵלִ֣ים יְנַחֵֽם׃
commentary_links.english:
I decided their course and presided over them;
I lived like a king among his troops,
Like one who consoles mourners.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: ואשב ראש ואשכון כמלך בגדוד כאשר
